acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Wire codec round trips exact metadata and payload through in-memory buffers.
Stable wire header layout and byte order are asserted.
Malformed metadata and wire input produce typed failures.
Scope excludes live LAN, product QUIC, artifact content, decode/render/presentation, latency, workflow dispatch, credentials, and Mac hardware.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Wire codec contract tests use in-memory Rust buffers only and do not require sockets, live LAN validation, Mac hardware, product QUIC, decode, render, presentation, latency measurement, workflow dispatch, credentials, or cross-device validation.
